title: To establish a pilot program for use by U.S. Customs and Border Protection at land ports of entry along the Arizona border to assess the use of artificial intelligence through an anomaly detection algorithm, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Homeland Security.
summary: The U.S. government plans to implement a pilot program at Arizona land ports of entry to test the use of artificial intelligence for anomaly detection. The goal is to assess its effectiveness for Customs and Border Protection purposes.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: This policy aims to mitigate the environmental effects of artificial intelligence, which is likely to grow significantly in the coming years. The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 seeks to prepare for and address the potential environmental impacts of AI advancements.

title: Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act
action: Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee (Amended) by Voice Vote.
summary: The Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act aims to safeguard families from the rising costs of energy used by artificial intelligence data centers. This act presumably works to mitigate the financial burden of data center energy consumption.

title: To require artificial intelligence chatbot providers to provide data privacy and security, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: This bill aims to require artificial intelligence chatbot providers to prioritize data privacy and security, to protect users' sensitive information. It proposes to add regulations on the use of AI chatbots for these purposes.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 is a proposed law that aims to address aging-related issues in relation to artificial intelligence. The specific details and goals of the law are not available.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 is a policy that aims to address issues related to aging and artificial intelligence. The policy likely focuses on how advancements in AI can impact older generations and ways to ensure their rights and welfare.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 619.
summary: The Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act aims to create a regulatory environment that allows for the growth and development of artificial intelligence in the financial services sector. This act is believed to promote innovation and efficiency while ensuring the safety and security of financial transactions.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.
summary: The Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act aims to promote the development and use of artificial intelligence in the financial sector. It likely aims to strike a balance between allowing innovation and ensuring AI is used safely and responsibly in financial services.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act is a policy aimed at preventing unfair and misleading AI practices that target consumers. It likely sets standards and regulations to ensure transparency and honesty in AI interactions.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: This policy document is about assessing the risk of terrorism using Generative Artificial Intelligence. The title suggests it's a law aimed at evaluating the potential dangers of this technology.

title: To amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to require the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy to establish a prize competition program relating to artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy aims to amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 by requiring the establishment of a prize competition program for artificial intelligence. The program will be managed by the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy for other purposes.

title: Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026 is a law intended to manage the risks associated with artificial intelligence. It would create a framework to identify, mitigate, and regulate potential risks and consequences of AI technology.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: This policy document, the Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act, appears to be a legislative attempt to assess and mitigate potential terrorism risks associated with the use and development of generative AI technologies. It likely outlines strategies and guidelines to ensure the safe and responsible use of these technologies to prevent malicious activities.

title: NSF AI Education Act of 2025
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 33 - 0.
summary: The NSF AI Education Act of 2025 is a policy aimed at enhancing education in artificial intelligence through the National Science Foundation. This act likely seeks to allocate resources and implement initiatives to improve AI education nationwide.

title: LIFT AI Act

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: This policy document appears to propose a temporary halt or restriction on the construction or expansion of artificial intelligence data centers. The exact details and purpose of this moratorium are not specified due to the lack of description.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act aims to impose a temporary halt on the construction of new artificial intelligence data centers. The exact details of the act are unclear as no further information is available.

title: Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act

summary: The Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act aims to inform consumers about the use of artificial intelligence in products and services. This act will likely require companies to disclose their AI usage, giving consumers more transparency and choice.

title: SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026

summary: The SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026 is a policy that regulates the use of artificial intelligence by the Small Business Administration (SBA). title: Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026

summary: The Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at regulating the development and use of artificial intelligence. This law likely seeks to ensure the creation and deployment of AI technologies prioritize safety and accountability while preventing potential misuse.

title: Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act

summary: The Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act is a policy that aims to use artificial intelligence to monitor and track heat-related emergencies. It appears to be an initiative to mitigate the effects of excessive heat with the help of advanced technology.

title: Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act is a policy aimed at supporting smaller artificial intelligence developers and companies. The details of the policy are unavailable, but it likely focuses on providing resources and advantages to these innovators.

title: Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026

summary: The Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at regulating AI to prevent its misuse in elections. The goal of this act is to ensure the integrity and fairness of elections by setting guidelines for the use of artificial intelligence.

title: Department of Advanced Technology and Artificial Intelligence Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
summary: This document outlines the policy and regulations surrounding the development and use of Artificial Intelligence by the Department of Advanced Technology. The purpose of this act is to establish guidelines and oversight for AI initiatives within the department.

title: American Leadership in AI Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committees on Energy and Commerce, Agriculture, Oversight and Government Reform, Education and Workforce, the Judiciary, and Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The American Leadership in AI Act is a policy aimed at promoting American innovation and leadership in the field of Artificial Intelligence. The exact details of the policy are unclear, but it likely involves measures to advance AI research and development within the United States.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 aims to regulate the environmental effects of artificial intelligence technologies. This act likely seeks to mitigate the potential harm caused by AI on the environment and develop sustainable AI practices.

title: Sectoral AI Governance Act of 2026
action: Referred to the Committee on the Judiciary, and in addition to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Sectoral AI Governance Act of 2026 is a proposed policy to regulate the use of artificial intelligence across different sectors. It aims to establish guidelines and oversight to ensure AI is developed and used responsibly and for the benefit of society.

title: Algorithmic Accountability Act of 2025
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: The Algorithmic Accountability Act of 2025 is a proposed law aimed at regulating the use of complex algorithms to make decisions in certain areas such as employment and credit scoring. The law seeks to increase transparency and accountability of AI systems to protect individuals from potential biases and unfair outcomes.

title: China AI Power Report Act
action: Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 47 - 0.
summary: The China AI Power Report Act is a policy document that likely outlines the regulations and guidelines for China's artificial intelligence (AI) industry, aiming to promote and develop China's AI power. The exact details of the document are unclear, but it may cover areas such as data protection, innovation incentives, and international cooperation.

title: K–12 AI Literacy and Readiness Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
summary: This policy is about teaching people, particularly children and young teenagers in the K-12 educational system, to understand and use artificial intelligence. The policy's name suggests it aims to prepare people for the increasing presence and influence of AI in their lives.

title: Preventing AI Censorship Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
summary: The Preventing AI Censorship Act is a policy that aims to prevent the restriction or removal of information by artificial intelligence systems. The exact details of the policy are not available, as the description is "no description available".
